case_title: BILTMORE SQUARE CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION, INC. VS. ALEXANDER LEVIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BILTMORE SQUARE CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEVIN, ALEXANDER LEVIN, JANE DOE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
